navbar.para_voce_desc: Checking account, exclusive credit card, investments, and advisory. Discover the benefits of being a Cais Investimentos client connected to BTG Pactual technology.

hero.title: Invest with personalized service and top-tier products
hero.subtitle: Enter the new era of investments and get the ideal portfolio for your needs and goals.

advisory.title: Your strategy, our expertise
advisory.subtitle: Specialized solutions to protect and boost your personal wealth and your business's financial health.

personal.title: Personal Investment Advisory
personal.p1: Our team of experts analyzes your risk profile, your short and long-term goals, and builds a tailor-made investment strategy.
personal.p2: Whether you are a beginner or an experienced investor, we are by your side to maximize your returns safely and responsibly.
personal.p3: With Cais, you navigate the financial market with confidence.

business.title: Business Investment Advisory
business.p1: Our corporate advisory is designed to help your organization optimize the management of its financial resources.
business.p2: We work with your team to create strategies that protect and expand the company's equity, diversifying investments and ensuring long-term financial sustainability.
business.p3: With Cais, your company finds the right path to grow solidly and safely in the financial market.

cards.title: Ultrablue BTG Pactual Card
cards.desc: Go further with up to 3.5 points per dollar spent or up to 1.7% cashback on all credit purchases, a dedicated concierge to support planning travel, events, and celebrations, unlimited access to LoungeKey VIP Lounges, and much more.

f1.title: Digital checking account
f1.desc: A complete checking account with no maintenance fees and valuable tips about your finances.

f2.title: Credit Card
f2.desc: Different card options for you to customize and choose the benefits that best match you.

f3.title: Black Card
f3.desc: The Black credit card where you choose the benefits and pay no annual fee when keeping R$ 30,000 invested with us.

f4.title: Non-Resident Account (CNR)
f4.desc: The ideal service for those who want to have an account in Brazil while living in another country.

simulator.desc: Discover your wealth's potential with BTG Pactual's technology and expertise. Build customized scenarios and plan your financial future with precision.
simulator.box_desc: A complete tool to project returns and compare market assets.

disclaimer.p1: Cais Investimentos Assessor De Investimento Ltda, registered under CNPJ No. 49.404.040/0001-98, is an investment advisory firm duly registered with the Brazilian Securities and Exchange Commission (CVM) under CVM Resolution 178. Acting in the financial market as an agent of Banco BTG Pactual S/A, which can be verified through the website of
disclaimer.p2: Banco BTG Pactual S/A is a financial institution that is part of the securities distribution system, acting as an intermediary for its clients' transactions. Under CVM legislation, an investment advisor cannot administer or manage investors' assets, as it is an agent of the intermediary and depends on the client's prior authorization to execute transactions in the financial market. When performing transactions with derivatives, there is the possibility of significant asset losses, including those exceeding the amounts invested. The advisory service may perform other activities related to the financial, capital, insurance, and supplementary pension and capitalization markets, which may or may not be in partnership with BTG Pactual or other institutions, and which may or may not be carried out by the same legal entity as the advisory service. Specifically regarding the activities of managing, consulting, and analyzing securities, these may be performed by group companies and never by the investment advisory firm itself, considering that these are conflicting activities requiring segregation. Investment in stocks is a risk investment and past profitability is not a guarantee of future profitability. For complaints, please contact the Banco BTG Pactual S/A Ombudsman at 0800-722-0048.

about.title: About us
about.p1: Cais is an investment firm that combines over 30 years of experience with new talent to offer personalized portfolios, transparency, and results aligned with clients' needs. Inspired by the compass rose, Cais symbolizes guidance and trust in the financial market.
